stemHtml: A pilot has filed a VFR flight plan and is flying to an uncontrolled airfield. Should the pilot close the flight plan after landing?

options.a: Yes — after landing, the pilot should contact the nearest ATS unit and close the flight plan.
options.b: No — the flight is under radar coverage and the plan closes automatically.
options.c: No — the plan closes automatically when landing at an uncontrolled airfield.
options.d: Yes — the pilot should inform the aerodrome operator as soon as possible after landing.
